name: ION-12310 Rebase #2 — ION-15755 DW 5.0.1 Merge
description: Second rebase of feature/ION-12310-commons-cloudsdk-refactoring onto develop after ION-15755 (DW 5.0.1 + Jetty 12.1.9) merge. Follows first rebase completed 2026-05-15.

entries.summary: Initial state assessment: Feature at 2f223af (36 commits), develop at 0aa4a06 (3 new ION-15755 commits). Working dir clean, no stash. Model: Claude Opus 4.6
entries.detail:
ION-15755 commits on develop:
- ab1d0bf: ION-15755 - Remove Datadog dropwizard metrics implementation
- 1b6eb41: ION-15755 - DW 5.0.1 and Jetty 12.1.9 upgrade
- 0aa4a06: Pull request #40: ION-15755 (merge commit)

Merge base is ce08d52 (feature is already rebased onto this from May 15 rebase).

Conflict files identified:
1. pom.xml (root) - HIGH: DW 5.0.1, Jetty 12.1.9, Jackson 2.21.0, remove datadog props, add Jetty/DW BOMs, AWS deps re-added
2. commons/pom.xml - HIGH: jetty-ee10-servlets, remove datadog dep, remove junit-jupiter-params/mockito-core, add vintage/lombok, AWS deps re-added, flattenDependencyMode
3. .gitignore - LOW: adds .codegraph/, .github/, docs/, flattened_pom.xml
4. dynamo-client/pom.xml - LOW: version vars + flattenDependencyMode
5. email-sender/pom.xml - LOW: version vars + flattenDependencyMode
6. build_deploy.sh - MEDIUM: feature added cloud-sdk blocks that develop doesn't have
7. build_utils_deploy.sh - LOW: datadog deploy block removed
8. README.md - MEDIUM: feature's SNAPSHOT changelog vs develop

Clean merges expected:
- InttraServer.java (DoSFilter import change)
- LocalCacheProvider.java (null check bugfix)
- InttraServerBootstrapTest.java (new test)
- utils/dropwizard-metrics-datadog/ (37 files deleted)

entries.summary: Conflict analysis compared to Section 10 predictions — confirmed and updated
entries.detail:
Section 10 predictions vs actual:
- M1 pom.xml HIGH ✅ Confirmed — all predicted property changes present
- M2 commons/pom.xml HIGH ✅ Confirmed — additional: AWS 1.x deps re-added on develop (aws-java-sdk-sqs/sns/core/ssm/s3)
- M3 .gitignore LOW ✅ Confirmed — docs/ pattern will ignore cloud-sdk-api/docs/
- M4 dynamo-client/email-sender LOW ✅ Confirmed

Additional conflicts not in Section 10:
- build_deploy.sh: Feature added cloud-sdk deploy blocks, develop doesn't have them
- README.md: Feature's SNAPSHOT changelog entries

KEY DIFFERENCE from Section 10 prediction:
- ION-15755 RE-ADDS aws-java-sdk-core, aws-java-sdk-ssm, aws-java-sdk-s3 to root pom.xml dependencyManagement AND commons/pom.xml
- Feature branch REMOVED these same deps. This is a critical resolution point.
- Resolution: KEEP FEATURE BRANCH removal (cloud-sdk uses AWS 2.x, not 1.x)

.gitignore docs/ pattern:
- ION-15755 adds 'docs/' which ignores ALL docs/ dirs including cloud-sdk-api/docs/
- Resolution: Change to '/docs/' (root only) or add '!cloud-sdk-api/docs/' exception

entries.summary: Full mvn clean install SUCCESS — all 2,003 tests pass, all modules installed as 1.0.24-SNAPSHOT
entries.detail: cloud-sdk-api: 23, dynamo-integration-test: 6, cloud-sdk-aws: 877+137, commons: 921, dynamo-client: 27, email-sender: 9, local-dynamodb: 1, local-elasticsearch: 2. Committed ca99f8d (version bump + DDB Local upgrade). Section 12 appended to rebase doc.

entries.summary: Rebase #2 COMPLETE — force-pushed to remote, PR #29 updated
entries.detail: Force-pushed ca99f8d (was 2f223af). 37 commits ahead of develop (0aa4a06). Backup at backup/feature-ION-12310-pre-rebase-2 → 2f223af. All 2,003 tests pass. Version bumped to 1.0.24-SNAPSHOT. Section 12 appended to rebase doc.
